chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 797 of 2023 C. P. No. D – 798 of 2023 C. P. No. D – 799 of 2023 C. P. No. D – 801 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 17.01.2024 Mr. Muhammad Nasir Malik, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Nazeer Ahmed Sahito, Advocate for respondents No.4 to 6. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Respondents’ Counsel submits that the case of each petitioner would be examined, and after proper audit and scrutiny, if some differential amount towards salary of the petitioners is found, the same would be paid to them in accordance with law. Learned Counsel for petitioners is satisfied and these petitions are accordingly disposed of in above terms. Office to place a signed copy of this order in the captioned connected matters. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
